requirement_topic.en: NVE/DSO Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Norway Network and Earthing Systems
requirement_topic.zh: NVE/配电运营商并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz挪威电网及接地系统
requirement_topic.zht: NVE/配電運營商併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz挪威電網及接地系統

summary.en: Norway electricity supply is operated by distribution system operators (DSOs), with sector oversight by NVE (Norwegian Water Resources and Energy Directorate) and Statnett as the transmission system operator. The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Norway has historically used IT earthing systems in many areas (particularly older industrial and rural installations), though TN-S is common in newer residential construction. Exported EV chargers should declare compatibility with both IT and TN earthing systems and should specify RCD type (Type B RCD, or Type A with DC fault protection) for Norwegian installation practice. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring NVE/DSO supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation.
summary.zh: 挪威电力供应由配电运营商（DSO）运营，NVE（挪威水资源和能源理事会）负责行业监管，Statnett为输电系统运营商。低压电网环境为单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。挪威历史上许多地区（尤其是老旧工业和农村装置）采用IT接地系统，但新建住宅通常采用TN-S。出口充电桩应声明与IT和TN接地系统均兼容，并为挪威安装实践说明RCD类型（B型RCD或带直流故障保护的A型）。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成NVE/配电运营商供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。
summary.zht: 挪威電力供應由配電運營商（DSO）運營，NVE（挪威水資源和能源理事會）負責行業監管，Statnett為輸電系統運營商。低壓電網環境為單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。挪威歷史上許多地區（尤其是老舊工業和農村裝置）採用IT接地系統，但新建住宅通常採用TN-S。出口充電樁應聲明與IT和TN接地系統均相容，並為挪威安裝實務說明RCD類型（B型RCD或帶直流故障保護的A型）。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成NVE/配電運營商供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能品質審查、調試及書面項目驗收。

standards_or_laws: NVE (Norwegian Water Resources and Energy Directorate) electricity network connection and project acceptance
Statnett grid codes for transmission-connected installations
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
NEK EN 60364-7-722 — Norwegian adoption of HD 60364-7-722 for EV charging installation

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Norway 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline. China uses TN-S or TN-C earthing systems predominantly; Norway's mixed IT/TN environment requires additional compatibility declarations from EV charger manufacturers.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：挪威230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。中国以TN-S或TN-C接地系统为主；挪威混合IT/TN环境要求电动汽车充电设备制造商提供额外的兼容性声明。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：挪威230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。中國以TN-S或TN-C接地系統為主；挪威混合IT/TN環境要求電動汽車充電設備製造商提供額外的相容性聲明。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for NVE/DSO review. Norway's historically mixed IT/TN earthing environment means charger installers should confirm earthing system compatibility before installation; the 50 Hz frequency matches China but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. For chargers declaring IT earthing system compatibility, insulation monitoring and isolation-fault detection features should be documented.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按NVE/配电运营商审查准备。挪威历史上混合IT/TN接地环境意味着充电设备安装商在安装前应确认接地系统兼容性；50 Hz频率与中国一致，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。对于声明兼容IT接地系统的充电设备，应记录绝缘监控和绝缘故障检测功能。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按NVE/配電運營商審查準備。挪威歷史上混合IT/TN接地環境意味著充電設備安裝商在安裝前應確認接地系統相容性；50 Hz頻率與中國一致，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。對於聲明相容IT接地系統的充電設備，應記錄絕緣監控和絕緣故障檢測功能。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require NVE/DSO project review and acceptance; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency; Norway's mixed IT/TN earthing history requires compatibility verification before installation
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an NVE/DSO approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Norway 230/400 V

source.publisher: Norwegian Water Resources and Energy Directorate (NVE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Norway-ready EVSE needs NVE/DSO project acceptance and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation. Norway's historically mixed IT/TN earthing environment means charger installers should confirm earthing system compatibility; the 50 Hz frequency matches China but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向挪威的EVSE需要NVE/配电运营商项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz。挪威历史上混合IT/TN接地环境意味着充电设备安装商应确认接地系统兼容性；50 Hz频率与中国一致，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向挪威的EVSE需要NVE/配電運營商項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz。挪威歷史上混合IT/TN接地環境意味著充電設備安裝商應確認接地系統相容性；50 Hz頻率與中國一致，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。
